title: VoteCastPayload
description: A vote landed — emitted EXACTLY ONCE per stored vote (the (electionId, voterId) natural key): a redelivered command is deduped, a fresh re-vote is rejected ALREADY_VOTED, so ledger replays and the dashboard's SSE tally can count VoteCast events 1:1. causationId = the GovernanceRequested command (DoD #2: VoteCast <- GovernanceRequested <- DecisionMade), or null when cast via the operator REST plane. Producer: government-service on government.events, aggregate = the Election.

candidateVillagerId.description: The villager voted for — consumers render 'Yara voted for Bram' without a government_db join.

reason.description: The voter's stated why — episode gold; null when unstated.
